concepts.name: Directed Acyclic Graph
concepts.short_definition: A directed graph with no directed cycles.

concepts.name: Graph Traversal
concepts.short_definition: Visiting all vertices in a graph in a systematic way.

concepts.name: Depth First Search
concepts.short_definition: A graph traversal algorithm that explores as far as possible along each branch before backtracking.

concepts.name: In-degree
concepts.short_definition: The number of incoming edges to a vertex in a directed graph.

concepts.name: Kahn's Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: A topological sorting algorithm that uses in-degrees and a queue.

concepts.name: Topological Sort
concepts.short_definition: A linear ordering of vertices such that for every directed edge uv, vertex u comes before vertex v in the ordering.

concepts.name: Cycle Detection
concepts.short_definition: Identifying if a graph contains any cycles.

concepts.name: Dependency Resolution
concepts.short_definition: Determining the order in which tasks or items must be processed based on their dependencies.

concepts.name: DFS-based Topological Sort
concepts.short_definition: A topological sorting algorithm that utilizes Depth First Search.

concepts.name: Applications of Topological Sort
concepts.short_definition: Real-world problems that can be solved using topological sorting.
